_comment: DEMO / FAKE therapist data for the website-fill engine. Fictional person, fictional practice, placeholder license numbers and contact info. Covers every data {{token}} in FILL_MANIFEST.md §1. Not a real clinician; do not contact.
tagline: Steady work for anxious, overwhelmed adults.
populations: adults, young professionals, healthcare and first-responder clients
signature_method_name: The GROUND Method (authored only with LLM enrichment; the no-LLM floor presents a generic, evidence-informed process)
education: MSW, University of Texas at Austin, 2013
superbill_policy: Monthly superbill provided on request for out-of-network reimbursement
sliding_scale_policy: A small number of reduced-fee slots are reserved each year and fill quickly.
hero_video_alt: Two hawks in flight at sunrise
background_summary: more than a decade across community mental health, a hospital trauma service, and an employee-assistance program
career_history: 2013-2016 community mental health center (clinician); 2016-2019 hospital-based trauma and acute care service (clinical social worker); 2019-2020 employee-assistance / first-responder program (senior clinician); 2020-present founded Cedar & Sage Therapy

career.desc: Frontline outpatient care across mood, anxiety, and crisis presentations — the volume that teaches you to assess fast and build trust faster.
Bedside work with patients and families in the worst hours of their lives, where steadiness matters more than any single technique.
Short-term, high-stakes work with police, fire, and EMS — people who do not trust easily and do not have time to waste.
Private practice serving anxiety, trauma, and life transitions. Licensed for Texas & New Mexico.

ai_disclosure: Created with AI assistance from Shaula. Reviewed and approved by Jordan Avery, LCSW before publication.
